# TheVideoJanitors

> Clean edits. Fast delivery. No freelancer roulette.

TheVideoJanitors is a subscription-based short-form video editing platform. Clients subscribe to a monthly plan, submit raw footage with a creative brief, and receive polished edits within 48 hours — matched to a vetted editor automatically.

## What We Do

Managed video editing marketplace for creators, brands, and agencies who post short-form content on Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts. No hiring freelancers, no back-and-forth on rates, no missed deadlines.

## How It Works

1. Client subscribes to a plan and receives monthly editing credits
2. Client submits a request: raw footage link (Google Drive / Dropbox) + brief (vibe, captions, aspect ratios)
3. Platform automatically matches the request to a vetted editor based on niche, availability, and rating
4. Editor delivers within 48 hours
5. Client reviews, requests up to 3 revisions, then approves
6. Credits are deducted at submission — not at delivery

## Pricing (USD)

- Quick Sweep: $99/month — 350 credits
- Deep Clean: $249/month — 950 credits
- Full Service: $599/month — 2,500 credits

Credit packs (top-up):
- Small: $33 — 100 credits
- Medium: $75 — 250 credits (10% off)
- Large: $140 — 500 credits (13% off)

Edit costs per job:
- Basic edit: 50 credits
- Standard edit: 70 credits
- Premium edit: 100 credits

## Pricing (INR — India)

- Quick Sweep: ₹2,499/month — 350 credits
- Deep Clean: ₹5,999/month — 950 credits
- Full Service: ₹13,999/month — 2,500 credits

## User Roles

- **Clients**: Creators, brands, agencies who submit video editing requests
- **Editors**: Vetted video editors who fulfil requests and receive weekly payouts
- **Admins**: Platform operators who manage matching, payouts, and disputes

## Key Features

- Automatic editor matching (niche, availability, performance score)
- 48-hour delivery guarantee
- Up to 3 revision rounds per request
- Real-time request status tracking
- Credit balance visible at all times
- Weekly payouts for editors (Stripe Connect for USD, Razorpay for INR)
- Dual-currency support: USD via Stripe, INR via Razorpay

## Tech Stack

React 18, TypeScript, Supabase (Postgres + Auth + Realtime), Stripe Billing, Razorpay, Netlify
